zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey Stafford於1427年出生在英國武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福時，他的父親Sir Humphrey Stafford27歲，母親Eleanor Aylesbury21歲。他於1452年與Katherine Fray在英國英格蘭賀福爾葛拉芙頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年7月8日在英國倫敦享年59歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey Stafford于1427年出生在英国武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福时，他的父亲Sir Humphrey Stafford27岁，母亲Eleanor Aylesbury21岁。他于1452年与Katherine Fray在英国英格兰賀福爾葛拉芙頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年7月8日在英国倫敦享年59岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey Stafford was born in 1427, in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, his father, Sir Humphrey Stafford, was 27 and his mother, Eleanor Aylesbury, was 21. He married Katherine Fray in 1452, in Grafton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 8 July 1486, in London, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey Stafford est né en 1427, à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Stafford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Aylesbury, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Fray en 1452, à Grafton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1486, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey Stafford 1427 in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Humphrey Stafford 27 und seine Mutter Eleanor Aylesbury 21. Er hat 1452 in Grafton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Katherine Fray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juli 1486 im Alter von 59 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford è nato il nel 1427 nel Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir Humphrey Stafford, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Aylesbury, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Fray nel 1452, nel Grafton, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 luglio 1486, nel London, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Staffordが1427年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブロムスグローブで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Staffordは27歳，母Eleanor Aylesburyは21歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグラフトンでKatherine Frayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年7月8日にイギリスロンドンで59歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey Stafford(이)가 1427년 영국 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Stafford(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Aylesbury(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 그라프턴에서 Katherine Fray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 7월 8일 영국 런던에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey Stafford nasceu em 1427, em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Stafford, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Aylesbury, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Fray em 1452, em Grafton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1486, em London, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey Stafford родился в 1427 г. в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Aylesbury, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Fray в 1452 г. в местности графтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 8 июля 1486 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey Stafford nació en 1427, en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Humphrey Stafford, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eleanor Aylesbury, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Katherine Fray en 1452, en Grafton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de julio de 1486, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
